examples: Would the man's perfidy never reach a limit?
The suspicions of British perfidy were bad enough.
As devotion unites lovers, so perfidy estranges friends.
It's no surprise that the Democrats and much of the media have had a field day billing this as some sort of GOP Watergate-like perfidy.
We seem to willfully live under a presumption that this time is different, that it must be real and exciting, because the laws protect us from the perfidy of con men.
